title: polyscias lanutoensis
intro: Polyscias lanutoensis, also known as the Lanuto's tree, is a species of plant in the family Araliaceae, native to New Caledonia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are derived from its leaves and bark. The health benefits of Polyscias lanutoensis include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive issues, making it a valuable plant for treating various health conditions. The herbal preparations of Polyscias lanutoensis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
